title: Boolean
documentation:
## Purpose
The [Boolean](https://capdag.com/browse/media:bool;textable) type represents a single true/false value encoded as UTF-8 text.

## When to use
Use this type for scalar boolean outputs — for example, a validation result, a feature flag value, a predicate test outcome, or any binary decision. For sequences of booleans, use `media:bool;list;textable`.

## Notes
Accepted representations include `true`/`false`, `yes`/`no`, and `1`/`0` (case-insensitive). Implementers should normalize to a canonical form on output. The exact accepted vocabulary should be documented at the port if it diverges from this default set.
